Privacy & Safety
Control who can interact with you
Privacy Controls
Manage who can interact with your account
Who can message you Direct messages from other users
Who can follow you Follow your public activity and posts
Who can send friend requests Add you as a friend on GeoHub
Profile visibility Who can view your full profile page
Default post visibility Who sees your new posts by default
Who can see your full name Display name on your profile page
Who can see your bio Short description on your profile
Who can see your stories 24-hour story content on your profile
Who can see your highlights Saved story highlights on your profile
Blocked Users
These users cannot see your content or contact you
Muted Users
Their posts are hidden from your feed
Account
Data and account management
Download your data Get a copy of everything GeoHub has stored
Deactivate account Temporarily hide your profile and content
